content.text:
The file /workspace/YatCC/AGENTS.md has been edited. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of /workspace/YatCC/AGENTS.md:
    19	- Just had to make `task/0/main.cpp` exit normally. Wrote a minimal `std::cout << "Hello, YatCC!"` and `return 0;`.
    20	- Scoring: program exit code 0 тЗТ 100. (`test/task0/score.py`)
    21	
    22	## Task 1 тАФ DONE (100/100, 72/72 cases)
    23	- Stack: `antlr` (set in `config.cmake`'s `TASK1_WITH`).
    24	- Files modified:
    25	  - `task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4`: full token set (const/int/void/return/if/else/while/break/continue, all punctuation, `==`/`!=`/`<=`/`>=`/`&&`/`||` BEFORE the single-char variants so they win, decimal/octal/hex `Constant`). Whitespace/Newline/`#`-markers go to `channel(HIDDEN)` (NOT `skip`), so we can still query them тАФ but actually we ignored them and computed [StartOfLine]/[LeadingSpace] from the source text directly.
    26	  - `task/1/antlr/main.cpp`: read input fully, build `phys_line -> (real_file, real_line)` table from cpp line markers (`# linenum "file" flags*`), then for each token output `kind 'text'\t [StartOfLine]\t [LeadingSpace]\tLoc=<file:line:col>` where:
    27	    - `col = token->getCharPositionInLine() + 1`
    28	    - `[StartOfLine]` set on first emitted token per physical line
    29	    - `[LeadingSpace]` set when prev char on the same line is `' '` or `'\t'`
    30	    - EOF emitted at (lastFile, lastLine, lastCol+lastLen) тАФ i.e. one past end of last real token
    31	- Output format pitfall: always emit two `\t` (one after `'text'`, one before `Loc=`) regardless of whether flags appear, otherwise the answer compare fails.
    32	- Score breakdown (per case): 60% token kind+value, 30% Loc, 10% middle markers (`[StartOfLine]`/`[LeadingSpace]`).
    33	- Reference answer at `build/test/task1/<case>/answer.txt`; produced by `task1-answer` target (depends on `task0-answer`).
    34	
    35	## Task 2 тАФ DONE (100/100, 72/72 cases)
    36	- Stack: `antlr` (`TASK2_WITH=antlr`, `TASK2_REVIVE=ON`, so input is Task 1's clang-style token dump).
    37	- Files modified:
    38	  - `task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.tokens` тАФ added IDs for `Const Void If Else While Break Continue Star Slash Percent EqualEqual ExclaimEqual Less LessEqual Greater GreaterEqual Exclaim AmpAmp PipePipe`.
    39	  - `task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.cpp` тАФ extended `kClangTokens` map (clang token name тЖТ numeric token id).
    40	  - `task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4` тАФ full SYsU grammar:
    41	    - primary `Identifier`, `Constant`, `( expression )`
    42	    - postfix: array `[ expression ]`, call `( argumentExpressionList? )` (left-assoc)
    43	    - unary `+ - !` (recursive)
    44	    - precedence ladder: `* / %`, `+ -`, `< <= > >=`, `== !=`, `&&`, `||`
    45	    - assignment is right-recursive (`unary = assignment`)
    46	    - declarations: `typeSpecifier` (Int|Void), `typeQualifier` (Const), function declarators with `parameterTypeList` (named or abstract; arrays in abstract decl).
    47	    - statements: `if/else`, `while`, `break`, `continue`, `return`.
    48	    - `functionDefinition: declarationSpecifiers directDeclarator compoundStatement` тАФ declarator-based so we share parameter parsing with declarations.
    49	  - `task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.hpp/.cpp` тАФ rewrote `Ast2Asg` to walk the new grammar:
    50	    - `DeclarationSpecifiers`: handles Int/Void plus `Const` qualifier.
    51	    - `DirectDeclarator`: also handles `LeftParen parameterTypeList? RightParen` тЖТ builds `FunctionType` with `params` (loses param names; backfilled later).
    52	    - `PostfixExpression`: iterates children, emits `BinaryExpr(kIndex)` for `[]` and `CallExpr` for `()`.
    53	    - All precedence-level expression rules walk `children`, dispatching on token type.
    54	    - `UnaryExpression`: supports `+`, `-`, `!`.
    55	    - `PrimaryExpression`: also wraps `( expression )` as `ParenExpr`.
    56	    - `SelectionStatement` / `IterationStatement` тЖТ `IfStmt` / `WhileStmt`.
    57	    - `JumpStatement`: `return`, `break`, `continue`.
    58	    - `FunctionDefinition` and the function-decl branch of `InitDeclarator` re-walk `parameterTypeList` to fill `params[i]->name` (since `FunctionType` only carries types).
    59	- Pitfall: param names тАФ initial pass missed forward function declarations (sylib.h prototypes), so ParmVarDecl had empty `name` and the comparator dropped ~3 points per file. Fix is to backfill names by re-walking `parameterDeclaration` list in `InitDeclarator` for the FunctionType branch.
    60	- `Typing.cpp` & `Asg2Json.cpp` are framework-provided and already handle every node kind we generate; no changes needed.
    61	
    62	## General Patterns Observed
    63	- `score.py` produces `score.txt` (human) and `score.json` (autograder) under `build/test/task<n>/`.
    64	- Per-case answer files live under `build/test/task<n>/<case>/answer.*` (e.g. `answer.txt`, `answer.json`, `answer.ll`).
    65	
Review the changes and make sure they are as expected. Edit the file again if necessary.

observation.old_content:
# YatCC Repository тАФ Agent Notes

## Repo Layout
- Working dir: `/workspace/YatCC` (equiv. to `/YatCC`).
- Tasks live in `task/<n>/`. Tests + scoring in `test/<n>/`.
- Build dir: `build/`. Scoring outputs at `build/test/task<n>/score.txt` and `score.json`.
- Toolchain: clang/LLVM at `/workspace/YatCC/llvm/install`, antlr at `/workspace/YatCC/antlr`.

## Forbidden
- Do NOT modify anything in `/workspace/YatCC/test/` except `test/diy-cases/`.

## Common Commands
- Build a task: `cmake --build build -t task<n>`
- Score a task: `cmake --build build -t task<n>-score`
- View score: `cat build/test/task<n>/score.txt`
- Force rebuild: `rm -rf build && cmake -S . -B build && cmake --build build -t task<n>`

## Task 0 тАФ DONE (100/100)
- Just had to make `task/0/main.cpp` exit normally. Wrote a minimal `std::cout << "Hello, YatCC!"` and `return 0;`.
- Scoring: program exit code 0 тЗТ 100. (`test/task0/score.py`)

## Task 1 тАФ DONE (100/100, 72/72 cases)
- Stack: `antlr` (set in `config.cmake`'s `TASK1_WITH`).
- Files modified:
  - `task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4`: full token set (const/int/void/return/if/else/while/break/continue, all punctuation, `==`/`!=`/`<=`/`>=`/`&&`/`||` BEFORE the single-char variants so they win, decimal/octal/hex `Constant`). Whitespace/Newline/`#`-markers go to `channel(HIDDEN)` (NOT `skip`), so we can still query them тАФ but actually we ignored them and computed [StartOfLine]/[LeadingSpace] from the source text directly.
  - `task/1/antlr/main.cpp`: read input fully, build `phys_line -> (real_file, real_line)` table from cpp line markers (`# linenum "file" flags*`), then for each token output `kind 'text'\t [StartOfLine]\t [LeadingSpace]\tLoc=<file:line:col>` where:
    - `col = token->getCharPositionInLine() + 1`
    - `[StartOfLine]` set on first emitted token per physical line
    - `[LeadingSpace]` set when prev char on the same line is `' '` or `'\t'`
    - EOF emitted at (lastFile, lastLine, lastCol+lastLen) тАФ i.e. one past end of last real token
- Output format pitfall: always emit two `\t` (one after `'text'`, one before `Loc=`) regardless of whether flags appear, otherwise the answer compare fails.
- Score breakdown (per case): 60% token kind+value, 30% Loc, 10% middle markers (`[StartOfLine]`/`[LeadingSpace]`).
- Reference answer at `build/test/task1/<case>/answer.txt`; produced by `task1-answer` target (depends on `task0-answer`).

## General Patterns Observed
- `score.py` produces `score.txt` (human) and `score.json` (autograder) under `build/test/task<n>/`.
- Per-case answer files live under `build/test/task<n>/<case>/answer.*` (e.g. `answer.txt`, `answer.json`, `answer.ll`).
- `cases.txt` lists official test cases.
observation.new_content:
# YatCC Repository тАФ Agent Notes

## Repo Layout
- Working dir: `/workspace/YatCC` (equiv. to `/YatCC`).
- Tasks live in `task/<n>/`. Tests + scoring in `test/<n>/`.
- Build dir: `build/`. Scoring outputs at `build/test/task<n>/score.txt` and `score.json`.
- Toolchain: clang/LLVM at `/workspace/YatCC/llvm/install`, antlr at `/workspace/YatCC/antlr`.

## Forbidden
- Do NOT modify anything in `/workspace/YatCC/test/` except `test/diy-cases/`.

## Common Commands
- Build a task: `cmake --build build -t task<n>`
- Score a task: `cmake --build build -t task<n>-score`
- View score: `cat build/test/task<n>/score.txt`
- Force rebuild: `rm -rf build && cmake -S . -B build && cmake --build build -t task<n>`

## Task 0 тАФ DONE (100/100)
- Just had to make `task/0/main.cpp` exit normally. Wrote a minimal `std::cout << "Hello, YatCC!"` and `return 0;`.
- Scoring: program exit code 0 тЗТ 100. (`test/task0/score.py`)

## Task 1 тАФ DONE (100/100, 72/72 cases)
- Stack: `antlr` (set in `config.cmake`'s `TASK1_WITH`).
- Files modified:
  - `task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4`: full token set (const/int/void/return/if/else/while/break/continue, all punctuation, `==`/`!=`/`<=`/`>=`/`&&`/`||` BEFORE the single-char variants so they win, decimal/octal/hex `Constant`). Whitespace/Newline/`#`-markers go to `channel(HIDDEN)` (NOT `skip`), so we can still query them тАФ but actually we ignored them and computed [StartOfLine]/[LeadingSpace] from the source text directly.
  - `task/1/antlr/main.cpp`: read input fully, build `phys_line -> (real_file, real_line)` table from cpp line markers (`# linenum "file" flags*`), then for each token output `kind 'text'\t [StartOfLine]\t [LeadingSpace]\tLoc=<file:line:col>` where:
    - `col = token->getCharPositionInLine() + 1`
    - `[StartOfLine]` set on first emitted token per physical line
    - `[LeadingSpace]` set when prev char on the same line is `' '` or `'\t'`
    - EOF emitted at (lastFile, lastLine, lastCol+lastLen) тАФ i.e. one past end of last real token
- Output format pitfall: always emit two `\t` (one after `'text'`, one before `Loc=`) regardless of whether flags appear, otherwise the answer compare fails.
- Score breakdown (per case): 60% token kind+value, 30% Loc, 10% middle markers (`[StartOfLine]`/`[LeadingSpace]`).
- Reference answer at `build/test/task1/<case>/answer.txt`; produced by `task1-answer` target (depends on `task0-answer`).

## Task 2 тАФ DONE (100/100, 72/72 cases)
- Stack: `antlr` (`TASK2_WITH=antlr`, `TASK2_REVIVE=ON`, so input is Task 1's clang-style token dump).
- Files modified:
  - `task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.tokens` тАФ added IDs for `Const Void If Else While Break Continue Star Slash Percent EqualEqual ExclaimEqual Less LessEqual Greater GreaterEqual Exclaim AmpAmp PipePipe`.
  - `task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.cpp` тАФ extended `kClangTokens` map (clang token name тЖТ numeric token id).
  - `task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4` тАФ full SYsU grammar:
    - primary `Identifier`, `Constant`, `( expression )`
    - postfix: array `[ expression ]`, call `( argumentExpressionList? )` (left-assoc)
    - unary `+ - !` (recursive)
    - precedence ladder: `* / %`, `+ -`, `< <= > >=`, `== !=`, `&&`, `||`
    - assignment is right-recursive (`unary = assignment`)
    - declarations: `typeSpecifier` (Int|Void), `typeQualifier` (Const), function declarators with `parameterTypeList` (named or abstract; arrays in abstract decl).
    - statements: `if/else`, `while`, `break`, `continue`, `return`.
    - `functionDefinition: declarationSpecifiers directDeclarator compoundStatement` тАФ declarator-based so we share parameter parsing with declarations.
  - `task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.hpp/.cpp` тАФ rewrote `Ast2Asg` to walk the new grammar:
    - `DeclarationSpecifiers`: handles Int/Void plus `Const` qualifier.
    - `DirectDeclarator`: also handles `LeftParen parameterTypeList? RightParen` тЖТ builds `FunctionType` with `params` (loses param names; backfilled later).
    - `PostfixExpression`: iterates children, emits `BinaryExpr(kIndex)` for `[]` and `CallExpr` for `()`.
    - All precedence-level expression rules walk `children`, dispatching on token type.
    - `UnaryExpression`: supports `+`, `-`, `!`.
    - `PrimaryExpression`: also wraps `( expression )` as `ParenExpr`.
    - `SelectionStatement` / `IterationStatement` тЖТ `IfStmt` / `WhileStmt`.
    - `JumpStatement`: `return`, `break`, `continue`.
    - `FunctionDefinition` and the function-decl branch of `InitDeclarator` re-walk `parameterTypeList` to fill `params[i]->name` (since `FunctionType` only carries types).
- Pitfall: param names тАФ initial pass missed forward function declarations (sylib.h prototypes), so ParmVarDecl had empty `name` and the comparator dropped ~3 points per file. Fix is to backfill names by re-walking `parameterDeclaration` list in `InitDeclarator` for the FunctionType branch.
- `Typing.cpp` & `Asg2Json.cpp` are framework-provided and already handle every node kind we generate; no changes needed.

## General Patterns Observed
- `score.py` produces `score.txt` (human) and `score.json` (autograder) under `build/test/task<n>/`.
- Per-case answer files live under `build/test/task<n>/<case>/answer.*` (e.g. `answer.txt`, `answer.json`, `answer.ll`).
- `cases.txt` lists official test cases.
